title: Honey's QoL Lite [discontinued]
description: Honey's QoL Lite: lightweight performance-oriented modpack designed as a template for other modpacks or for singleplayer and multiplayer use.
body:
seeing as SOP has been discontinued so will this, and i personaly think they way they put it is best.

"trans rights! free palestine! all cops are bastards! copying is not theft, and piracy is as ethical as it gets! live your life so that the fash get ten aneurysms a second just looking at ya."

While i disagree that copying is not theft i feel this is an amazing statement. goodbye and thank you for using HQOL Lite.
